commands.purpose: Table view of transactions. Filterable by tenant, kind, date range, currency, reference (Invoice/Payment/Refund/etc.). Default limit 100; use --limit=0 for stream mode. Reserved for support tooling.
Verbose read of one transaction: base fields + ledger entries + reversal chain (if reversed) + reference entity chain. Support tool for investigating a specific ledger movement.

Admin-only manual reversal. Creates a NEW offsetting transaction with reversal_reason='accounting_adjustment'. --note is REQUIRED + must be ≥ 10 chars (regulator-visible justification). --dry-run computes the reversal + validates the ledger balance without persisting. Every real fire writes a critical audit row + fires TransactionAmendmentApplied.
Delivery ledger view. Filterable by tenant, transaction, account, date range. Support tool for tracing double-entry chains.

Real-time per-account running balance. --account can be repeated (--account=cash --account=accounts_receivable). --as-of=YYYY-MM-DD computes balance at end-of-day (defaults to now()). Reserved for support tooling.

One-shot invocation of ReconcileLedgerBalancesJob. --scope=per_transaction|per_account_daily|global_tenant (defaults to per_transaction). --dry-run reports findings without persisting. --tenant= restricts to a single tenant; omit for cross-tenant sweep (super_admin only).

Generate the General Ledger report. --from + --to define the date range (defaults to previous calendar month). --format=json|csv|jsonl. --output= sinks to a file path (defaults to stdout). Requires transaction_advanced_reporting entitlement on the target tenant.

Bulk export for accountants + auditors. --format=jsonl|csv. Streams to stdout. Includes every transaction + every ledger entry in the range. Idempotent — reruns produce identical output for a given date range. Reserved for scheduled audit exports + support tooling.

One-shot install command. Creates the tenant's opening_balance transaction with ledger entries per --balances= (a JSON file mapping account → cents; defaults to all-zero if omitted). Refused if the tenant already has an opening_balance transaction — must be called exactly once per tenant. Used during data migrations from legacy systems + for test fixtures.
Read-only report of every LedgerImbalanceDetected fire in the range + resolution status. --unresolved-only filters to open items. Feeds the on-call runbook + regulator investigations.
